subject: Acme · weekly read
body:
Hi D. — quick weekly read before Tuesday.

What We're Seeing
The ops team is absorbing the new cadence and the Strategic Innovation work has a clearer owner this week.

Quick Pulse Check
Dominant Logic from 2019 still shapes how the business cases get built — flagging rather than pushing.

Preliminary Read
No action needed before Tuesday. We will revisit after the board prep.
notes: Skeleton — content owner replaces with real Acme email (§2.8) pre-demo.
